problem.title: Minimum Cost of Buying Candies With Discount

approaches.title: Sort and Apply Discount Iteratively
approaches.summary: Sort candies in descending order and sum every two candies while skipping the third to minimize cost.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial implementation using iterative state tracking to apply discount every third candy.

approaches.title: Sort and Chunk Sum with Functional Style
approaches.summary: Sort candies in descending order and sum the first two candies in every group of three using functional operations.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Refactored to use chunks and map for concise functional approach while maintaining correctness.
